title: ekmanianthe longiflora
intro: Ekmanianthe longiflora, also known as the "Korean mountain tea," is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae, native to the mountainous regions of Korea and China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ekmanianthe longiflora include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Ekmanianthe longiflora can be prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to reap its medicinal benefits.
